icon.$description: Gap between an inline icon and adjacent text.

label.$description: Gap between a label and its value within a single field.

selection.$description: Gap between a selection control and its label.

card.$description: Gap between cards in a list or grid.

field.$description: Gap between fields within a form.

section.$description: Gap between sections on a page.

sectionTitle.$description: Gap between a section heading and the content below it.

action.$description: Gap between a content group and its primary action.

postHero.$description: Gap between a hero band and the first content block below it.
